"use strict"; Object.defineProperty(exports, Symbol.toStringTag, { value: "Module" }); const react = require("react"); const withSelector = require("use-sync-external-store/shim/with-selector"); function defaultCompare(a, b) { return a === b; } function useStore(atom, selector, compare = defaultCompare) { const subscribe = react.useCallback( (handleStoreChange) => { if (!atom) { return () => { }; } const { unsubscribe } = atom.subscribe(handleStoreChange); return unsubscribe; }, [atom] ); const boundGetSnapshot = react.useCallback(() => atom?.get(), [atom]); const selectedSnapshot = withSelector.useSyncExternalStoreWithSelector( subscribe, boundGetSnapshot, boundGetSnapshot, selector, compare ); return selectedSnapshot; } exports.useStore = useStore; //# sourceMappingURL=useStore.cjs.map
